classObjective: Distinguish between vertical and horizontal transformations given a function rule and write transformed linear functions from verbal descriptions.
workedExamples: 4-4, Example 5 — Describe Vertical Dilations of f(x) = x
4-4, Example 6 — Describe Horizontal Dilations of f(x) = x
conceptDevelopment: Mini-lesson: vertical stretch/compression; reflection identification; combined transformation description
guidedPractice: Teacher-led practice distinguishing transformation types and writing transformed functions from descriptions
independentPractice: Practice problems describing and writing transformed linear functions including dilations and reflections
assessment: Exit ticket: write a function that reflects f(x) = x across the y-axis and shifts up 2 units
capReflection: How can you distinguish between vertical and horizontal transformations just by looking at the function rule?
